ddls:
CREATE TABLE "bed_utilization_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "log_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the log entry */,
  "last_date" TEXT /* Date of the last recorded metrics */,
  "last_time" TEXT /* Time of the last recorded metrics */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Identifier for the nursing unit */,
  "total_open_staffed_beds" INTEGER /* Total number of open staffed beds in the unit */,
  "ventilated_patients" INTEGER /* Number of ventilated patients in the unit */,
  "non_ventilated_patients" INTEGER /* Number of non-ventilated patients in the unit */,
  "total_empty_beds" INTEGER /* Total number of empty beds in the unit */,
  "off_unit_patients_icu" INTEGER /* Number of off-unit patients in ICU/ACCU (excluding ICCS) */,
  "off_service_patients" INTEGER /* Number of off-service patients (including ICCS) */,
  "pending_admissions" INTEGER /* Total number of pending admissions */,
  "transferable_patients" INTEGER /* Total number of patients that are transferable */,
  "number_of_nurses" INTEGER /* Total number of nurses including charge nurses */,
  "log_source" TEXT /* Source of the log (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "bed_utilization_rate" REAL /* Calculated bed utilization rate */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* Identifier of the user who last updated the log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bed_utilization_logs_unit FOREIGN KEY ("unit") REFERENCES units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bed_utilization_logs_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit (e.g., HSC_IICU) */,
  "unit_type" TEXT /* Type of unit (e.g., ICU, General Ward) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Total capacity of the unit in terms of beds */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the unit (e.g., Critical Care, Neurology) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the unit (e.g., building, floor) */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the unit */,
  "head_nurse_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the head nurse of the unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_units_head_nurse_id FOREIGN KEY ("head_nurse_id") REFERENCES nurses ("nurse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the patient */,
  "admission_date" TEXT /* Date when the patient was admitted */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the unit where the patient is admitted */,
  "ventilation_status" TEXT /* Ventilation status of the patient (e.g., ventilated, non-ventilated) */,
  "transferable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient is transferable to another unit */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "diagnosis" TEXT /* Primary diagnosis of the patient */,
  "admitting_doctor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the doctor who admitted the patient */,
  "discharge_date" TEXT /* Date when the patient is discharged (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_admitting_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("admitting_doctor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nurses" (
  "nurse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nurse */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the nurse */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the unit where the nurse is assigned */,
  "shift" TEXT /* Shift during which the nurse is working */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the nurse (e.g., Staff Nurse, Charge Nurse) */,
  "shift_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the nurse's shift */,
  "shift_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the nurse's shift */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the nurse */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the nurse */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience of the nurse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nurse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nurses_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admissions" (
  "admission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admission record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient being admitted */,
  "admit_date" TEXT /* Date of admission to the unit */,
  "transfer_date" TEXT /* Date of transfer to another unit (if applicable) */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the unit where the patient was admitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the patient (e.g., admitted, transferred) */,
  "discharge_date" TEXT /* Date when the patient is discharged (if applicable) */,
  "reason_for_transfer" TEXT /* Reason for transferring the patient to another unit */,
  "admitting_doctor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the doctor who admitted the patient */,
  "discharging_doctor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the doctor who discharged the patient (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admissions_admitting_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("admitting_doctor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admissions_discharging_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("discharging_doctor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admissions_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admissions_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "log_time" TEXT /* Time when the action was logged */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., add, update, delete) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the user who performed the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to perform the action */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system (e.g., nurse, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
